items.title: Bolivian president declares state of emergency
items.dek: The move comes after weeks of anti-government protests that have caused a shortage of basic goods in Bolivia.
items.body: The move comes after weeks of anti-government protests that have caused a shortage of basic goods in Bolivia.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Iran says it is closing Strait of Hormuz over Israeli attacks on Lebanon
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump hits out at Italy's Meloni after pushback on G7 photo claim
items.dek: Trump said the Italian leader asked "over and over" for a picture at G7, after she said the US president "made-up" a story that she "begged" for a photo.
items.body: Trump said the Italian leader asked "over and over" for a picture at G7, after she said the US president "made-up" a story that she "begged" for a photo.
items.author: IriLine Desk
